detectedPattern: 34/34 issues lack implementation artifacts. Executor phase never emits implementation-issue-{n}.json, blocking token/tool/time baselines.
planningSignal: agent-runtime.config.yml declares emits_artifacts but executor skills do not enforce emission.
architectureSignal: Meta harness optimization requires all three artifacts; benchmark metrics untrackable without implementation artifact.
decompositionSignal: No backlog issue wires implementation-artifact emission as executor acceptance criterion.
reviewSignal: Review skill does not gate on implementation artifact presence.

recommendedBacklogItem.title: Wire implementation-artifact emission into executor agent workflow
recommendedBacklogItem.description: Every executor run must write artifacts/implementations/implementation-issue-{n}.json with issueId, executorDomain, tokenUsage, toolInvocationCount, executionDurationMs, retryCount, contextFilesLoaded, skillsLoaded. Validate skill should FAIL if missing.
